code: import api from'./api';export const getArtistes=()=>api.get('/artistes');export const getArtiste=id=>api.get("/artistes/".concat(id));export const createArtiste=data=>api.post('/artistes',data);export const updateArtiste=(id,data)=>api.put("/artistes/".concat(id),data);export const deleteArtiste=id=>api.delete("/artistes/".concat(id));
